tool_input.content:
from pathlib import Path
from core.memory_layers import LongTermMemory

base = Path('memory/long_term')
ltm = LongTermMemory(str(base))
ltm._rebuild_index()
print('summary_index', len(ltm.index))
print('item_index', len(ltm.item_index))
print('summary_terms', len(ltm.inverted_index))
print('item_terms', len(ltm.item_inverted_index))
print('index_exists', (base / 'index.json').exists())
print('tmp_left', len(list(base.glob('index.*.tmp'))))
print('pending_left', (base / 'index.pending.json').exists())
print('memory_items_on_disk', len(list(base.glob('memory_item_*.json'))))
print('summaries_on_disk', len(list(base.glob('summary_*.json'))))
